name: 平板

reference_prompt: A standard 10-inch black-framed silver-screen tablet with metal frame and glass display, rectangular shape with stand, placed stably in the center of a plain desk, no motion, front view at 45-degree angle, high detail, realistic rendering for prop design reference.。源记录硬约束：数量:1；位置:桌中央；运动政策:无运动保持稳定
